_meta.description: W-Engine database (Lv. 60, R1 — refinement effects are never auto-applied). v1 ships only the DUMMY engine (a copy of Deep Sea Visitor); more engines are added here as a data-only change.
_meta.conventions: advanced_stat uses the same stat names and fraction convention as discs.json (0.24 = 24%). passive_note documents effects the user must enter manually as external buffs.

dummy_engine.name: DUMMY Engine (Deep Sea Visitor copy, R1)
dummy_engine.passive_note: R1 passive (Ice DMG +25%, conditional CRIT Rate buffs) is NOT auto-applied; enter it as external buffs when active.
